modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Keyboard and trackpad not functioning on Windows laptop

full_description_text:  
I'm having issues with my laptop where the mouse and keyboard just stopped working. I was trying to type a document when suddenly nothing responded. It's running on Windows OS, and I've checked the connections, but still no luck.
short_description: Keyboard and trackpad not functioning on Windows laptop
description: I'm having issues with my laptop where the mouse and keyboard just stopped working. I was trying to type a document when suddenly nothing responded. It's running on Windows OS, and I've checked the connections, but still no luck.
